name: Lebanon
summary: Israel ground incursion since Mar 3. ~1,000 killed, 1M+ displaced (~25% of population). Lebanese government demanded Hezbollah surrender weapons. Country caught between Israel and Hezbollah.

signals.content: Israel launched ground incursion into southern Lebanon against Hezbollah. Strikes on Beirut.
At least 41 killed in Israeli air attacks on Bekaa Valley. Hezbollah and Israeli troops clashing on ground.
Lebanese PM Salam demanded Hezbollah surrender weapons and restrict to political activities. Emergency Cabinet meeting. ~1,000 dead, 1M+ displaced.

edges.context: Hezbollah operates from Lebanon. War devastating the country — 1M displaced, 1,000 dead.
Israeli ground forces operating in southern Lebanon. Airstrikes on Beirut. Multiple front war.
